The paths leading to the vulnerable line is such that the vulnerability condition (uip_ext_len) being unconstrained, is not satisfied. Looking at the vulnerability description, this is an OOB read but since Contiki-NG uses a fixed size buffer, the read is still within allocated bounds
The error location should be in merge_strings, when merging the two strings without checking buffer size
Only identified call path has a constraint added 8 years ago that confirms sdu_length is within valid limits. A perfect example to illustrate the usefulness of our preconditions

Same as initial point. The current_index value is validated and the static buffer is configured to MTU sizes. This is also another config-dependent error because the packetbuf depends on a config PACKETBUF_SIZE, which, if it differs from the MTU configured, becomes a bug.
This was marked as angelic precondition because it constrained the buffer size argument with the actual buffer size, but it was not a direct constraint and so it was not angelic.
